name: RF Wally
description:
uuuuh there were no bots for this and I wanted it so.. we getting 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 tonight

essentially what's happening is Wally's in a rut (definitely taking advantage of those cat characteristics lol) and locked up in his room. so barnaby comes up with the great idea of just.. throwing you in there. since you're his assistant and so close of course. just to help him out a little.

anyways.. been a while since I made a bot I suppose. hope this isn't cringe :0 any pov btw I hate when bots are specific in that category

also don't forget I'm cool if anyone requests anything. just put it in the bot's review and if I actually get enough people requesting one day i'll make a bot specifically for it. i'm more likely to do it if it's for a bot I already have (like hidden rainbow or the siren au of rf) since I have personalities for those already. thanks :) !!!

ex tags- rainbow factory . Walden . wally darling .
creator: purple-jester9000
